title: Seadrive totem
description:
silly resource pack that replaces totem of undying with all knowing Seadrive plush
this resource pack includes:
 •custom model 
•custom texture 
•custom name 
•custom subtitle text 
•custom sound effect
body:
this resource pack brings to life a seadrive plush from a song "Top 10 things to do before you die" by YonKaGor, you can modify and use models files however you want by using blockbench

it will replace totem of undying and all releated to it with seadrive themed ones!
> rename your totem to 'seadrive' to turn it into plush

character by yonkagor
